Who We Are

Built on Kansas City Values

Hometown Roofing started with a simple goal: to provide Kansas City homeowners with roofing solutions they can trust. We're not just roofers; we're your neighbors, committed to protecting your homes from the unpredictable Missouri climate.

We believe in honest assessments, transparent pricing, and unwavering dedication to quality. From the initial inspection to the final shingle, we approach every project with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring a roof that lasts.

Hometown Roofing is actively involved in supporting local initiatives and organizations strengthening our community. We're proud to be Kansas City natives and give back to the city that has given us so much.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Hometown Roofing

Local Expertise

We understand Kansas City's unique weather challenges and housing styles.

Quality Materials

Using only the best roofing materials designed for long-term performance.

Skilled Craftsmanship

Our experienced team delivers exceptional workmanship on every project.

Reliable Service

We're committed to providing prompt, professional, and dependable service.

Get a Free Roofing Inspection

Protect your home with a durable roof that stands the test of time. Contact us today!

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Hometown Roofing did an outstanding job replacing our roof. They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is exceptional. They even cleaned up thoroughly afterward. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Roof Replacement
“

Our gutters were damaged in a recent storm. Hometown Roofing came out quickly and repaired them perfectly. They were reasonably priced and very responsive.

David K. Gutter Repair
“

We recently bought a home in Brookside and wanted to ensure the roof was in good condition. Hometown Roofing provided a very thorough inspection and gave us peace of mind. Very knowledgeable.

Jennifer L. Roof Inspection
“

After a bad hailstorm, Hometown Roofing helped us navigate the insurance claim process and repaired our roof quickly and efficiently. They were a lifesaver!

Michael B. Storm Damage Repair
“

We had Hometown Roofing install a skylight in our living room, and it has completely transformed the space! The installation was smooth, and the skylight looks beautiful. Great job!

Jessica P. Skylight Installation
“

Hometown Roofing fixed a persistent leak in our roof. They were prompt, courteous, and the repair seems very solid. I'm very happy with their service.

Robert S. Roof Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a roof replacement typically take?
Most roof replacements can be completed in 1-3 days, depending on the size and complexity of the roof.
What type of roofing material is best for Kansas City's climate?
Asphalt shingles are a popular and cost-effective option, but metal roofing and tile roofs offer enhanced durability and longevity.
Do you offer financing options for roof replacements?
Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your roof replacement more affordable.
